summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UCIM WebGL 3D visualization component. Both desktop WebGL and mobile CSS fallback versions working correctly with all required features implemented.

design_issues.issue: One element found with non-zero border-radius (minor)

passed_tests: WebGL canvas renders inside ucim-container element
All 8 node labels appear correctly: Market Position, Competitive Landscape, Organizational Context, Risk Architecture, Revenue Structure, Stakeholder Mapping, Strategic Alignment, Operational Reality
Central gold node visible and breathing/pulsing during hold phase
Cyan connection lines draw from center to orbital nodes
Cross-connection lines appear between orbital nodes
Hex grid substrate visible at bottom of scene
CSS fallback renders on mobile viewport with central pulsing diamond, orbital dots, and connecting lines
Page header shows 'Sarif Consulting' eyebrow and 'Universal Contextual Intelligence Matrix' title
Space Grotesk font loaded and applied to labels
No JavaScript errors during full animation loop
Labels track their respective 3D node positions
Mobile CSS fallback with all 8 labels and SVG connections working
